item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-22 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] google-ai-edge/mediapipe (+47 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +47，前 3 日均值 12，加速度 3.9x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+3330 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +3330，前 3 日均值 526.7，加速度 6.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] KnockOutEZ/wigolo (+1302 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1302，前 3 日均值 433，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] 1jehuang/jcode (+1365 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: The most intelligent agent harness for code Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1365，总 stars 10,265，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] diegosouzapw/OmniRoute (+2794 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2794，总 stars 23,456，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+991 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +991，前 3 日均值 322，加速度 3.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] every-app/open-seo (+1179 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1179，总 stars 6,543，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Graphify-Labs/graphify (+1520 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Turn any codebase, with its docs, SQL schemas, configs, and PDFs, into a queryable knowledge graph. A /graphify skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini CLI: local deterministic AST parsing, every edge explained, no vector store. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1520，总 stars 93,079，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] nexu-io/open-design (+672 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +672，前 3 日均值 252.3，加速度 2.7x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] calesthio/OpenMontage (+729 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +729，前 3 日均值 301.7，加速度 2.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] rtk-ai/rtk (+501 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +501，前 3 日均值 151，加速度 3.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] langgenius/dify (+306 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: Build Agentic workflows, RAG pipelines, with rich AI model and tool support on one collaborative workspace. Deploy on cloud, VPC, or self-hosted, so teams move from prototype to production without rebuilding the stack. Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +306，前 3 日均值 93.7，加速度 3.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
